productDisplayName: Clarks Men Sentry Cry Mahogany Leather Brown Shoes
description: These clarks C& J derby shoes in rich mahogany leather are sure to up your casual style this summer without compromising on your comfort. The textured upper and the subtle stitching add a distinctive, contemporary look and its lightweight soles with the Active Air technology are the perfect companion for your long, stress-free strolls on the golf links. Upper Derby shoes with upper made of textured pure leather Two-hole lace-ups for snug Fit Midsole Spongy EVA footbed, contoured for comfort The double layer won& rsquo t flatten out through wear & ndash ensuring long-lasting comfort Air pockets and channels spread the impact as the feet hit the ground Outsole Wear-resistant outsoles with grooves and texture for grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner and leather brush to restore shine Store away from sunlight
